---
title: "Baobao Fang"
image: images/Baobao/Baobao_profile.jpg
body-classes: fun-page
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:mtfang@sas.upenn.edu
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/stories/highlights/18070496642548120/
---

<p style="text-align: center !important;">
<b>Security Guard</b> at <b>the Meowtropolitan Museum of Art</b> in New York City.<br>

I collect tennis balls, sticks, peacock feathers, and anything Mengting brings to me.<br>

I am also a <b>freelance scientist</b> and am composing a grand research plan.<br>

Funding pending. Peer review ongoing (self-reviewed, very positive).<br>

For collaboration, contact my purrsonal assistant, Mengting 🐾
</p>

<br>

<div style="text-align: center;">
  <button onclick="toggleAlbum()" id="toggle-btn"
          style="background: #6ab040; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 20px; padding: 10px 24px; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer;">
    🐾 Psst... click me if you dare 🐾
  </button>
</div>

<div id="secret-album" style="display: none; text-align: center; margin-top: 20px; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.8s ease;">
  <p><em>You found Baobao's secret archive. Tell no one.</em> 🤫</p>
  ![](images/Baobao/Baobao_secret1.jpg){width=45%}
  ![](images/Baobao/Baobao_secret2.jpg){width=45%}
</div>

<script>
function toggleAlbum() {
  const album = document.getElementById('secret-album');
  const btn = document.getElementById('toggle-btn');
  if (album.style.display === 'none') {
    album.style.display = 'block';
    setTimeout(() => album.style.opacity = '1', 10);
    btn.textContent = 'Shhhh... Baobao is watching 👀';
    setTimeout(() => {
      album.style.opacity = '0';
      setTimeout(() => {
        album.style.display = 'none';
        btn.textContent = '🐾 Psst... click me if you dare 🐾';
      }, 800);
    }, 3000);
  } else {
    album.style.opacity = '0';
    setTimeout(() => album.style.display = 'none', 800);
    btn.textContent = '🐾 Psst... click me if you dare 🐾';
  }
}
</script>
